reviews.review_title: Fun for the Whole Family! Achievements!
reviews.review_description:
Update: The latest update adds Quest Achievements - it has now become my go-to relaxing VR experience! 

Ever since we discovered this game, we've had to keep all of our headsets charged so that we can all color-a-cube! The Mixed Reality mode is perfect for relaxing with a cup of coffee while maneuvering the puzzle. The packs are varied and I love that the next level unlocks upon completion of the previous puzzle. I've always loved Color-by-Numbers, but this takes it to a whole new level. Controls are easy to use and it is perfect for all skill levels. Easily one of our favorite ways to relax!

This is the first thing I go into when I put on my headset. Packs are pretty reasonably priced using money and you have options on some puzzles to use points you’ve earned for completing the puzzle first time around.  I have finished all the puzzles that have been released as of 26Apr26 so while I await new puzzles I just go back in and redo them again and make a personal challenge of seeing how fast I can complete the puzzle.  First time around is for the relaxing time then and when doing again is my challenge time!  Maybe the developer can add a timed option that can be set on or off in the settings for a future update!

Two game genres that I'm seriously addicted to are power washing and this color-by-numbers type. When I discovered you can hold the trigger and sweep over the object to fill in color, I got both itches scratched. (It's probably "cheating," but that's how I enjoy playing it.) Love all the tiny features, like being able to resize and move the object around freely. My favorite is the mandela. If you made a mandela pack I'd be all over it!

Loving this game even though I am losing hours everyday. Lots of fun puzzles ,using many different colours to turn colour by number cubes into multi coloured 3d pictures.  Pictures that you can turn,twist and move pretty much anyway you want. When you complete a puzzle you get points which can be used to buy other single colour-a-cube puzzles.
 If you can't find that last couple of hidden cubes then there is also a hint button that you can use to show you were they are. Music is also very relaxing in the headset as you play.  

The only problem I have is as I can see my room and the wife in the headset, when I excitedly tell her to look at what I am colouring she comically reminds me that she can't see what I am doing.🤣🤣.
I'm going to update this review now as I have been gifted the Spring pack, really enjoying it I've done the birdbath and the painting ,really relaxing. Also brought landmarks and on the move . Did the tractor and the bike. I would fully recommend this and it's dlc. I haven't found a bad one yet, a couple of quite hard ones but got there with a little help from the magic button.

I just started the spring pack, and it doesn't disappoint. Included are all the things we love about spring such as butterflies and flowers in lovely pastel colors. There are also some unique button sounds. I'm determined to finish them without any hints, but it's nice to know that's an option. Great way to spend a few extra minutes in your day.

My apologies for the horrible write-up yesterday, it was out of character and uncalled for; turns out I've been festering a fever for the last few days and I just thought everything was out to get me lately...

The main menu would definitely benefit from your proposed overhaul and, as mentioned, an ability to auto-scroll the colours by holding the stick for a set duration for those sets with more colours than I've had brain cells this week — maybe even holding a trigger to jump 5-10 spaces or something would be a great addition.

I'll still have nightmares about "Landscape Painting", but I think the main issue was my own with with that one when I did it last night — I retract the overly harsh words and maybe somewhere down the line, I might get to enjoy it properly.

Again, sorry for my misguided ire, and thank you so much for being patient, understanding, and proving how fantastic you are by calmly taking the time to explain what's going on.

Keep up the fantastic work, I'll always continue to buy your stuff on day-one!

Initial Review:

Essentially a 3D version of those Paint-by-Numbers pictures. Hugely relaxing — until you've got one cube left and don't want to hit the hint button! Can't recommend it enough, even the DLC costs less than a beer and gives a couple of hours of extra joy to the day (just wish they were released more often). Also gets fixes quickly so, again, can't recommend it enough.

developer_response.body:
Hi there,

First of all, thank you for taking the time to write such a detailed review. We genuinely appreciate it, even if some parts of the experience were frustrating. It’s clear you care about the game, and that means a lot to us. Luckily, a lot of your frustrations are already being addressed and planned to be updated by mid-June.

Regarding the menu: we completely hear you. A reworked UI is already in development, where content will be organized vertically in a collection view instead of the ever-expanding horizontal layout. We agree this will make browsing much clearer and faster.

About the “Landscape Painting,” we understand your frustration. That model was designed with players in mind who enjoy more complex, color-heavy challenges, but we recognize that this doesn’t match everyone’s idea of a relaxing experience. We do have a new color palette-feature in the works that will make these challenges more fun to do.

Just in case you didn’t know: there’s a setting that automatically switches to the next color once one is completed, which can help reduce the amount of manual clicking. We also really like your suggestion about adding a shorter auto-scroll delay, and that’s something we’ll be looking into.

As for harder-to-find cubes: all models are handcrafted and playtested to make sure they’re fully completable, but we understand that some can feel a bit too hidden. If there are specific models or moments that stood out as particularly frustrating, we’d love to hear which ones so we can improve them.

We’re currently preparing a larger overall update for June. At the same time, we’re also trying to respond to the demand for new content, both through DLCs and through our weekly free content drops.

We truly take feedback seriously and always strive to make the experience as enjoyable as possible for everyone. The best way to share feedback or talk with us about the game is through our Discord server or any of our other channels, which you can find on our Linktree: linktr.ee/ColorACube

Thank you again for sharing your thoughts, and we hope future updates can win you back.

We really appreciate you taking another look and updating your review. <3

reviews.review_description:
I've been doing this since the app first came out. When I complete those models one by one at the end of the day without any thinking, it's really effective to cool down my mind. I've already finished all my library and I recently got the spring pack from FB GA(thanks to Paul, Andy and Mark), so I'm doing it. It's nice to feel the warm spring day.

One thing I hope is that I've built up a lot of Vox Points, but there's nothing more to use them now. It was fun to collect Vox, so please add items to use them.

Plenty of new items with a Spring theme. Love how you can pace the filling of colours.                          You can search and hunt each numbered colour and with ten items to complete there is many hours of relaxation ahead .                                                      A wonderful addition to the base game

This is a review for the Retro Tech Pack. 

If you love retro, you'll love this add on. 10 different designs, all based on retro technology. There's everything from OG Macs to Gameboys to Walkmans to Polaroid cameras. Obviously all named suitably to ensure no copyright infringements. 

The designs are really true to life and lovingly recreated in voxels. They're easy to complete but because they're so cute and nostalgic you find yourself saying, "Go on, I'll do another one."

In conclusion, if you were around in the 80's and 90's you'll find these retro technology puzzles a hit.. right in the feels. Enjoy.

This game is an amazing and relaxing game, that is fun for all ages. Highly recommended for puzzle fans, gamers, and artlists of all walks. Its good for a challenge experience or leisurely experience. It will be especially appealing to those who love pixel art, or coloring activities.

reviews.review_title: Great game - I have some suggestions
reviews.review_description:
I really enjoy the game! I do have a wishlist for future versions:

It would be nice to look at the puzzle for a while when it is complete. Right now it spins around and then disappears, but I want to enjoy my accomplishment!

It would be great to change the music, maybe some kind of playlist. Birdsong or ocean wave sounds would be great!

Can I request more painting-like puzzles? Especially if we don't get a preview of the result, and we discover it as we complete it.

It is a wonderful relaxing game, I look forward to playing it a lot.
I really enjoy this game more than coloring on paper I wish it had all the color by number we see in stores

Imagine having a bad day, a worse evening and a night of no sleep waiting only for you. Yes, you Need to relax! And what's better than getting your 3d model full of numbers, your paint wheel, and your powerful pointer, and sink yourself down in a world of cubes, with a relaxing music and nothing more than a relaxing time with yourself. Seriously guys, this game is awesome. Commands are simple, you can point and Paint with One hand, select the color numbers with the other Stick controller, and move the model in full 3d pushing the trigger. So simple and so enjoyable, It takes you, cuddle you, and makes you feel Happy.
I had the occasion to access an expansion pack dedicated to retro materials, you have 10 new models to Paint, dedicated to the 80s and 90s... Retro things, relaxing music, and Paint with numbers. I had a bad day, but luckily, now I know how to make It a Better day!!! Thanks guys!!!

Great game, relaxing that I can do it sitting down and great seeing the pictures come alive.  At the same time, keeps my brain ticking over with the challenge of finding the last couple of blocks.  Thanks Devs and keep up the great work…..more challenges to follow 😁👍

I really enjoyed the game, it's very good to relax after a busy day especially if you just want to sit in the couch/bed and move as little as possible . I played it on my pc as well and playing it on the meta quest just really enhances the experience. Being able to look at your finished work is really nice. Overall great game
App saying restart game or contact develope wont let me on

developer_response.body:
The problem was caused by a Unity Services outage, which prevented the game from launching properly. This was unfortunately outside of our control, but the good news is that it should now be resolved, and the game should launch normally again.

That said, we’ve identified something on our side that we can improve. Right now, the game doesn’t handle this type of outage very gracefully (for example, it doesn’t fall back to an offline mode). We’ll be working on improving this so that similar issues won’t block you from playing in the future.

Thanks a lot for your patience and for reporting the issue so quickly!

If you’re still experiencing problems, feel free to reach out, though for faster and better support, we recommend reporting issues via our Discord, socials, or email. https://linktr.ee/ColorACube

Happy coloring!

reviews.review_description: This is a really well designed game.  It's very relaxing to play.  Kind of like coloring, but more fun.  It's also a great value since the base game is free.  I highly recommend it.

Snuggle up under a blanket and put on some cozy music -- and lose yourself in this game. I've colored every one of their models (which took weeks, even playing multiple hours a day) so I'm ready to tell you it's a great way to relax. It goes beyond just the coloring experience though, with very satisfying clicks, taps, and chimes that play as you color each cube as well as haptic feedback in the controller. Controls feel very natural. To take it up a notch, they also have a active Discord. One of my favorite parts, if you have pass-through on your headset, is I can still see my cats or even watch a movie while coloring. I recommend this game to all my coloring-loving friends. *cozy music optional, the in-game music (which you can turn on/off) is also very cozy and not annoying.

reviews.review_title: Easy to Learn, Hard Not to Love.
reviews.review_description: This is a fantastic game, it is such a simple concept but so so rewarding.  You select the numbered palate and simply fill in the corresponding number squares to color a picture.  It is that simple and that satisfying when done. And as the base game is free it is one to get to try out and when you do, you will love it.  I have actually moved on to getting and playing the DLC it’s that enjoyable.  This is such a welcome break from the fast and furious I normally play, well done devs.

I'm a paint by number enthusiast IRL so transferring that interest VR was made easy with Color A Cube. I truly enjoy the moments of calm it provides and I've incorporated it into my cardio cool down routine.
I have the started app and the Aquatic Pac.  Both provide several designs and I prefer the critters! So, stinking cute. 
The app is easy to use and it's very gratifying to see the object come into being in front of you. I love the shading of the colors that add more depth to the end result. You can adjust the size of the design you're working on, too! Comes in super handy for older eyes like mine. I find the ambient music also helps to create a lovely and relaxing experience. If you're looking for a calm, satisfying app to add to your library, give Color A Cube a try!

I absolutely love this game to have a cosy evening and relax! I’m still able to see my cats play or sleep in my lap with the pass through, while being immersed in the game. There’s a lot of variation in the models, from spooky to educational to downright impressive art pieces! The sounds are amazing as well and really add to the experience. In short: I’m obsessed!

This is a very well made game. It is relaxing, has great sound design and the controls just feel right. It is the sort of game you sit down to play, and after every puzzle you say, “just one more” until your headset battery goes dead.

reviews.review_title: easy to learn, hard to stop
reviews.review_description: I loved playing the game!  It was hard to stop with all the different models and colors. I played a lot of colors by numbers but this experience is way better.

Absolutely fallen in love with this game, stumbled across it by accident and it was like finding a piece of list jewellery.
It only took a few seconds to really grab me and it would not let go, the fact that the base game is free is just like stealing, the innovation from the dev is clever because now I want all the DLC’s on offer.
This just works and is seamless and takes painting by numbers to a new level.
This is a class act & minutes can turn into hours believe me, I have done just that.
EVERYONE NEEDS THIS GAME.

It's not often that a game takes me by surprise, but that's exactly what has happened.  I'm going to be honest - my first impression was a bit 🤷‍♂️, but once I got into my second puzzle I found I didn't want to stop.  Just one more.  Just one more.

I really enjoy the game and have purchased nearly every pack and model available. But there are a few left that won't give me the option to just buy with money but only seem to have option for in game currency purchase. But I don't have enough in game currency. I'm earning 3 for each day I go into the game but recoloring models doesn't earn more cubes so I'm stuck. I feel like I must be missing something as I've never seen a game that didn't have a cash purchase option for all levels/models. 
So I guess I have to do in daily to earn 3 at a time until I hit 200 a couple times so I can buy the remaining packs/models.

developer_response.body:
Hey Aletha, we're happy that you're enjoying our game! Normally the free vox works in streaks with each consecutive day a higher vox amount as reward until the streak restarts after a few days.

Other than that, each model completed gives vox in return with vox-models (the ones you buy with VOX currency) and event models having the possibility to give more vox as a reward than the normal ones.

We've heard our community ask for more ways to earn vox so we are definitely looking into it and are open to any ideas from our players. Feel free to join our Discord if you wish to interact with our team and community so together we can create the best experience possible!

Discord link: https://discord.gg/wjJenWVbgx

reviews.review_description: I have a very stressful job. This game is so relaxing for me. It’s a joy to play.
Pretty neat game, didn't expect to let the time fly that much while coloring ! It is quite relaxing to do, a simple almost-manual activity, yet rewarding.

Color-a-Cube is such a soothing experience. I love coloring in VR because it lets me switch off, slow down, and focus on something simple and creative. Filling in each cube feels almost meditative — the colors pop, the controls are smooth, and the whole process is surprisingly satisfying. If you enjoy relaxing, artistic moments in VR, this one is a gem.

a nice way to unwind, this game is obviously made with love. I like the little animation and the sounds from every colour, and music is a good addition to the process. maybe there will be some special textures in the future? like luminescent, glossy, velvety. in some premium packs or special edition
I love this game. It's alot of fun but it needs more models. I have 2 or 3 left to do then I'm done. Please make more models.

developer_response.body:
Great to hear that you're enjoying Color-A-Cube! 

Besides the free starter models, there are many optional DLCs available. If you’re looking for more free content, we release a new free model almost every week. Right now, we’re counting down to the holidays with a festive free model each week. So keep your eyes peeled ;)!

If you have any requests or ideas for new content feel free to join our Discord if you wish to interact with our team and community so together we can create the best experience possible!

Discord link: https://discord.gg/wjJenWVbgx

reviews.review_title: IMMERSIVE VOXEL ART AT YOUR FINGERTIPS!
reviews.review_description:
AN EXCITING MOMENT OF RELAXATION
Color-A-Cube combines simplicity and visual immersion. Perfect for relaxing without pressure and creating in VR.
AN ARTISTIC TOUCH IN YOUR VR HEADSET
Color-A-Cube won me over with its ability to transform a VR moment into a true creativity session.
You slide, color, fill voxel models, and watch the result take shape before your eyes.
The interface is simple and intuitive, and the relaxing setting allows you to sit back, breathe, and simply "be in the world."
The themes offered are varied and enjoyable, and the free game makes it easy to explore.
Of course, it's not an action blockbuster: no combat, no stress, just coloring. Some users may regret a lack of depth or long-term content, but for what it offers—a creative break—it does the job very well.
If you're looking for a gentle, visual VR experience that encourages reflection or relaxation after an intense session, Color-A-Cube is an excellent choice.
Wish you could use in game currency to buy the packs instead of ￼using real money besides the Valentine’s Day one ￼

developer_response.body:
Thanks so much for your review, we’re really glad you’re enjoying Color-A-Cube.

We try to offer a mix of everything. Alongside the free starter models, you’ll find a few dozen models that can be unlocked with in-game currency (vox), plus a variety of optional DLCs. If you’re on the hunt for more free content, we release a new free model almost every week.

Right now, we’re counting down to the holidays with a festive free model each week, and next week, we’ll be doing an extra round of freebies. Keep an eye out, there’s plenty more coming!

reviews.review_title: Cute game but gems don’t work
reviews.review_description:
I was quite enjoying it, very relaxing and cute. Unfortunately the Dead Cells pack won’t download and I can’t use the gems which spoils it. I have no purchase restrictions on my account so it makes no sense. Tried looking for solutions online but there’s nothing.

To the devs: thank you for replying. The packs show up on the in game store no problem but if I try to claim it, it just says it was unsuccessful. Same if I try to make a gem purchase. I also noticed that when playing the game that the gems accumulated do not add to the total in the shop.

developer_response.body:
Hey Emajix thank you for your review. Would you like to help us aunderstand the issue a bit better so we can help you out?

Normally the pack should be in the store under the Spotlight and Trending Tabs. If they're not there it probably means that you've already claimed it and it would appear in your collections.

The models release every week so now the first model should be unlocked nbut there are running timers for the other two.

If this is not the case please enlighten us further and feel free to join our Discord to further discuss the issue: https://discord.gg/K6AkeDY6

Hopefully this will help you :)

reviews.review_description: It is a really good app for winding down or to be on while waiting for something. I just wish there was more to color.

developer_response.body: Great to hear that you're enjoying Color-A-Cube! Besides the free starter models, there are many optional DLCs available. If you’re looking for more free content, we release a new free model almost every week. Right now, we’re counting down to the holidays with a festive free model each week. And next week, we’ll be doing an extra drop of freebies, so keep your eyes peeled!

reviews.review_title: A cool spray paint by numbers
reviews.review_description:
What a game!! This is so chill!
Hard to believe this is still Early Access… it seems so complete and had no bugs or issues at all.

There’s a lot of packs that are free and also some can be purchased for £1.99.
There’s a lot of free ones to download, and also some to unlock… and the other smaller ones you can unlock using the green gems that you collect by completed models. The dev also adds free ones over the weeks and months.

I love how you can zoom right in, and out of the model to explore every nook and cranny, searching for that elusive pixel you need to paint.

You hold the model in one hand and move it about, whilst using the other hand to select colours and paint the pixels.. you can do it pixel by pixel, or hold down trigger and just wave your hand over it as if you was spray painting the model. Theres also a very satisfying sound as you paint in the pixels :)

There’s a bar that goes around each colours number, that indicates your progress until it vanishes when all them colour pixels have been found.


There is also a hint button you can press that reveals where them hard to find pixels are.

An awesome chilled game, that plays music that matches the theme of the model you are painting, plays in the background to help you relax… or get frustrated at finding them last pixels lol

Amazing game for free, and deserves support for the developer by purchasing the extra model packs.

GET IT…. NOW!!!

Edit: I changed my original rating from 4 to 5 stars. Developers responded to my post within hours with a lot of information. Then a couple of weeks later they came through with some of the promised changes. This game is good!!
And may I add... I never thought I'd find a game to take me away from that other puzzling game. This one did! Thank you developers! Keep those updates coming!!!👍👍

This turned out to be a surprisingly positive impulse buy. Definitely worth the money! Here's some suggestions to consider:
1. Add achievements. Maybe amount of voxels colored, images completed, time spent, etc.
2. Add a timer that tells you how much you've spent on the puzzle. Maybe under the % completed (?)
3. (Got rid of this one because they already fixed it💪)
4. Add custom support. I've got several puzzle and drawing games where you can upload your own image and turn it into something the game uses. It would be really cool to color cubes of my cats.
5. Similarly, add design support. Provide an empty canvas with blank cubes that we can put together and assign numbers to color. Maybe we could them share them worth other players. Helps develop a community and build some buzz for the game. 
6. Create difficulty levels. Maybe decrease the number of colors available, or the number of voxels you're coloring. Or increase them to make it even harder.
7. Maybe add a player to compete with? Time-wise?
8. In other words, think big my friends!!

Wrote all this because this game has a lot of potential. Thank you for reading this far. Good luck!

developer_response.body:
Hey! We're super grateful that you revisited our old review and gave it 5 stars. We're super excited about all the ideas and are definitely looking into them.

Feel free to join our Discord if you haven't already. There you can collaborate with our developers and community to come up with new cool features together : https://linktr.ee/ColorACube

reviews.review_title: Super chill! Pop on a podcast and vibe
reviews.review_description: Took me forever to dive into Color-A-Cube but I’m super stoked I did. Seriously relaxing paint by numbers game that evaporates time

Thank-you for the constant add-ons, that parrot that just got put in is amazing,  I love the challenging ones like the locomotive.  I've bought all the content and look forward to more. 

Keep up the great work!

developer_response.body: You're very welcome for all the content ;) Thank you for your growing and continuous support for our game. And thank you for the nice review.

reviews.review_description:
What's not to love about this game?
Lots of free Models to color straight away and more to buy with the Vox currency you get for logging in each day and for completing Models. It's so chill and relaxing to play.
Its basically Paint by Colors. You can adjust setting to make it more challenging for yourself or easier.
I absolutely love it and I have bought the Starter Bundle with loads of extra packs to support the Devs.
Download it and give it a chance, you may end up loving it as much as I do.
It's Free to Play after all!

developer_response.body: Thank you for this super kind and awesome review!

reviews.review_description: Completed every puzzle, most more than once. I would suggest (as others have suggested) there be a timer option at least. There's not much replayability at the moment , we need a timer and achievements at least. And more puzzles ;-) I'm totally addicted.

developer_response.body:
How awesome is this! I guess we'll have to bring out more content then ;) We are currently looking into the features that are suggested involving more gamified features.

Stay tuned ;)

reviews.review_description: Very nice puzzles, enjoyable but downside puzzles don't save when done so after doing so many you forget what you've done so gone back to puzzling places 3D jigsaws

developer_response.body:
Hey Maggy! We're happy that you find the puzzles enjoyable.

The issue you describe should not be in the game so this sounds more like a bug to me. I've notified our Programmers and they're looking into it as we speak. This should get fixed in the near future if we find what's wrong.

Feel free to join our Discord if you wish to interact with our team and community so together we can create the best experience possible!

Discord link: https://discord.gg/wjJenWVbgx

reviews.review_description: As an old time gamer and seeing graphics change over time. It's hard for me to play anything in 8-bit.  I seen this game and thought I would go ahead and give it a try. So glad I did!!  I spend hours in this game. I keep saying one more just one more 🤭So relaxing and so well done. The developers really made it enjoyable.  I will be purchasing the add ons.  Please keep the add ons coming!!

developer_response.body: We will! Thank you for the review!

reviews.review_description:
I absolutely love this app! I can't stop playing it! It is very relaxing and fun. I love the images and the details. The new update took a bit of getting used to, but it so smooth, colors are brighter, and it loads faster. The team is great. They are responsive if you need something and are always open to feedback. I look forward to seeing how this new app grows in the future.

I have purchased every package and have played them over and over. If you are looking for a great relaxing game to play, this is the one! Keep up the great work Color-a-Cube team!

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for your support and kind words !

reviews.review_description: It feels as if mixed reality was made for this app instead of the other way around. Although the game is in early access it looks very polished. The gameplay itself is super relaxing and rewarding. I love the visual style of the voxel models and I am super hyped to see what comes next ! ✨

I absolutely love this app, and I spend hours on it, I'm totally addicted, it's relaxing and is great to use in MR, I've purchased all of the add on's and have recoloured them over and over again. The developers are great to deal with, very friendly and efficient when responding to any issues, I can highly recommend.
We met in ug beau I really like your game and it's relaxing

For a color the cubes by number type game, this is perfect

Seriously, no notes, its perfect

You get over 20 models for free, and can buy packs to support the development of this game/app

You chose what number you want to color by cycling them on your conroller like you'd expect. You have a little pointer/laser from your controller to paint the numbers. You can rotate and move the model with either hand, or use both hands to rotate, position and scale the model.

The settings let you control how you want to play the game. Theres an option to hide the other numbers, hightlight the numbers, show a hint if you cant find a number. When you finish a number it cycles you to the next number. You can toggle mixed reality mode off but clearly this is suppose to be played in mixed reality.

You can press and hold the trigger and move the pointer around to color the correct numbered cubes, or if you dont want to press the trigger you can turn on auto fill

Each time you color a cube, it makes a little noise based on the color and theres little variations in the sound it plays and its very satisfying

Works left and right handed.

Since the game is so simple it can run at 120 fps, theres an in-game option to change the framerate depending on how long you want your battery to last

The cubes have a nice shiny reflective lighting on them, reminds me of lego brick tales. The numbers look great even on the sides, and it uses the full resolution.

For a VR game this doesn't use much memory either, and you can just sit on your couch and play it. 

Just give it a go there's nothing to lose except your time...or possibly your whole headset if your partner who doesn't like VR gives it a try...

REVIEUWWWW!!! I just looked at this game today and gonna tell you I'm in love with it but I saw it very late so yeah I could only play for like 7 mins but the best art game on VR thanks for making this piece of art😁 😊😊😊 (btw 5 stars out of 5 stars) | Btw aigan this game is epic thanks for making this 3D art section) BYEEEEEE!!!
This game is very good and very nice

developer_response.body: Hey Devon, Thank you for your kind review!

reviews.review_description: I love the game so much. I couldn't get it to work in travel mode though?

developer_response.body: Travel mode is still in the works but thank you for the reminder! We'll look into it ;)

reviews.review_description:
I really enjoyed playing this. 

Coloring by number. Every color has his own sound.

developer_response.body: Very happy to hear that! Bedankt voor ons te steunen ;)

reviews.review_description:
Very happy with this game. 
Hour and hours of fun  puzzling 
Thanks for helping 👍

developer_response.body: Thank you for your support and the review !

reviews.review_description: Dig it!!
Just got the game and so far I love it. But is there a way to save my progress if I'm halfway through a cube. When I get back on I have to start all over again

developer_response.body:
Hi,

Painting progression is auto-saved every minute, and after clicking the "Save & Leave" button from the pause menu.

However, issues can occur if you are offline while trying to save, or if you stop painting by force quitting the app from the universal menu. Can you confirm that saving works if you try specifically pausing the game and clicking "Save & Leave" while connected to the internet? 

Sorry for the inconvenience!

reviews.review_description: Really injoy, very relaxing. Fun way to wind down.

developer_response.body: Thank you for the kind review! :)

reviews.review_description: Anazing
I was REALLY surprised at how engrossing and relaxing it is. I think I'm going to be spending some time with this one.
It’s so fun to relax on the couch and play this non stop👍👍

developer_response.body: That is nice to hear! Thank you for the kind words @Grace_Dave, hope you look forward to our upcoming updates! :)

reviews.review_description: You know when you tell yourself, just one more? This is this kind of game. It's simple yet so satisfying and almost meditative for me. It is a hidden gem and I am so happy I found it. I cannot wait to colour  bigger models because I got through them so fast.

developer_response.body: Thank you Vivahawaii for the awesome review! We're glad you are having a blast, hope you will look forward to our new packs and models :)

reviews.review_title: Kind of fun but lacking for me
reviews.review_description: They gave me credit of 300 and I used it to buy the sci-fi. It shows that I’ve got it, but I can’t do anything with it and can’t play the game or color. The developer solved my problem thank you for that. The game does have a mellow factor to it. ￼ I’m a little confused about the challenge, but it is kind of relaxing with the busy work of finding the numbers. I would like to see the subject matters be something realistic looking in 3-D. I’m a big fan of puzzling places, and I love the outcome of a finished puzzle.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback! We're happy that we were able to solve your issue :) I recommend joining our discord if you have suggestions on what type of models and packs you would like to color! We're actively looking for suggestions. https://discord.gg/QB27AGgxwJ

reviews.review_description: Wow, really pleasantly surprised by this game/app. The concept is new and I never came across those mechanisms, the gameplay is spot on as you can play very and have a good time very quickly. The most impressive part is the execution and user interface: the devs spent a long time designing the game to be 100% playable on VR with plenty of options anew small details that make the game a pleasure to play. Thanks for a great game!

developer_response.body: Thank you for your kind words! We're glad you're enjoying the concept and finding the gameplay fun and intuitive! Hearing that the execution and UI hit the mark means a lot to us. Thanks for playing and sharing your experience—it’s hugely appreciated! 😊🎨

reviews.review_description: I just downloaded this game instantly fell in love I love color by numbers it’s so cool to have this experience in VR ￼￼I love how you can reach and actually hold what your coloring ￼

developer_response.body: Thank you for the awesome review! We're happy to hear that you are enjoying Color-A-Cube!

reviews.review_description:
ColorACube is a delightful and relaxing!

The game strikes a perfect balance between challenge and relaxation, allowing players to focus on the meditative task of coloring while enjoying the satisfaction of unveiling intricate designs. The controls are intuitive, and the soothing background music enhances the overall calming vibe.

Whether you’re a casual gamer looking for a stress-free experience or a creative soul who enjoys artistic activities, ColorACube offers a uniquely rewarding escape. It’s a wonderful way to unwind while engaging your artistic side.

developer_response.body: Thank you for such a lovely review! It’s great to know ColorACube is offering you a rewarding and creative escape. Your kind words mean the world to us! 😊🎨✨

reviews.review_description:
This game is a visually stunning! The relaxing gameplay combined with the soothing music really helps me unwind. I particularly loved using the mixed reality feature, which adds a whole new level of immersion to the overall experience. 

I'm super excited to see what the developers have in store for the future, as they've created a fantastic foundation that I can't wait to explore further! <3

developer_response.body: Thank you so much! We’re happy that you’re enjoying our visuals/gameplay, and the mixed reality feature. Cool updates are on the way! stay tuned! ❤️

reviews.review_title: Fun, cozy, and creative use of XR
reviews.review_description:
Color a cube currently feels like a nice proof of concept for a cozy game version of painting little mini figurines. Its easy to get lost in trying to color in the different figurines and they take quite a while to finish, the models are well made and achieving optimized voxels is a challenge for developers, making it an impressive thing for vr.

Now the game isnt perfect either.
More packs would be nice, some freedom in how to color the figurines would extend the lifetime.
Maybe in the future a building mode would be nice so we can make our own models and maybe share the results with others or allow model templates to be exported, maybe even in a contest in which the 3 best models become a pack of their own to paint.

Anyways, cozy little app, big recommend to anyone wanting some low commitment XR fun

developer_response.body: Thank you for the thoughtful review! Glad to hear you're enjoying the cozy vibe and the challenge. Appreciate your ideas—feedback like this means a lot and I've sent it to our team! Thanks for recommending it! 😊

reviews.review_description: I didn't expect to enjoy this game as much as I do. The voxel coloring is super intuitive and there's something really satisfying about watching the models come together as you work. A great way to chill after a stressful day.

developer_response.body: Thank you for the kind words! We’re happy you’re enjoying our game and that you find it relaxing! Happy painting! 🎨✨

reviews.review_description: I've been having so much fun with Color-a-Cube! When I feel like relaxing, it's the perfect game to turn on. They keep releasing new packs, and the prices are very reasonable for the amount of time that I spent in it. I hope that we keep seeing new packs for a long time! They also listen to feedback. I hated that I couldn't differentiate the number 6 and 9 sometimes, so they've added a line under those numbers, which I really appreciate.

developer_response.body: Thank you NinjaGuyVR for the awesome review! Keep staying awesome and tell us what you think can be improved upon in our discord 💪! We're doing our best to make Color-A-Cube the best experience so feedback like that is crucial! We really appreciate it.

reviews.review_title: Can’t wait for the new packs 🤩
reviews.review_description:
Mega-cool this !! The reason why my christmastree isn’t decorated yet 🫣.

I didn't expect it to be so soothing. I'm totally a fan 😍

developer_response.body: Thank you so much! We're honored to be the reason your Christmas tree was still waiting for its decorations wahahaha!

reviews.review_description: This app is so fun! You can tell it was made by a passionate developer team. The beautifully crafted voxel models, the sound design, the attention to detail. I could not think of a more perfect demo to show my XR curious friends and family. Excited to see what comes next!

developer_response.body: Thank you for the kind review! We hope that you will enjoy our future updates! :)

reviews.review_description:
Ok, I'm going to give this a 5 💯. Finally something that's actually helping me destress in the evening 😬. Give us more packs please🙏🙏🙏

Pro tip: using it while taking the Brownies to the Superbowl 🚽 - works like charm!

developer_response.body:
Thank you for the awesome review! 🙌 We're happy that it is helping you unwind in the evenings—exactly what we hoped for! And don’t worry, more packs are on the way soon! 

P.S. Love the "pro tip"—true multitasking at its finest! 😂
